penalties.description: Maximum time reached without completing the task. The loop tail was never cut inside the trainer.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reported timeout at 180 seconds without tail cut completion, while GPT reported completion at 62 seconds with tail cut visible. Given the automatic zero condition for incomplete tasks and Claude's specific observation that instruments returned to home position without tail cutting, the incomplete task assessment takes precedence.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's timeout observation is consistent with incomplete task penalty and provides specific evidence of task non-completion

claude_value.description: Maximum time reached without completing the task. The loop tail was never cut inside the trainer.

gpt_value.description: The loop was applied off the target mark.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic zero condition that supersedes other penalties. Claude's specific observation of no tail cut completion supports this assessment
Consistent with incomplete task assessment - if tail cut was not completed, this phase should not be included
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of other factors
